description: Return to the LM and Closeout

tokens: You are 3 hours and 56 minutes into the EVA at this time.

tokens: Al and Ed, this is Houston.

tokens: Okay, and I'll give you periodic reports on how much time you've got left until you have to be back at the MESA.

tokens: Roger; bubble tangent to inner ring and almost due north.

transcript.speaker: Mitchell

tokens: Okay, Houston, on this (Pause) comprehensive sample, we're about a third of the way back to the LM.

I've not found an area exactly what I want, so I have drawn a circle which is approximately 2 meters in radius, and I'm going to pick the surface rocks from that, and a sampling of the surface fines from that area.

tokens: And I've photographically documented this location with a "locator" shot back to the LM and to the ALSEP.

tokens: Yeah, I wanted to pick up all the walnut-size rocks...

transcript.speaker: Shepard

tokens: Ed, be careful you don't put them in the ground.

tokens: For this amount of time, we can really only get the ones that are essentially about...

tokens: I'll get one (sample bag) for the fines.

transcript.speaker: Shepard

tokens: You want the medium-size scoop or the big scoop for this?

tokens: Okay; bring the stuff over right now.

tokens: The second small football coming from the same crater...From near the same crater.

Don't run into that crater, Al.
